name: Meetup GraphQL API
description: A single-endpoint GraphQL API for accessing and managing Meetup community data including groups, events, members, tickets (RSVPs), venues, and photos. Supports querying, mutations for event creation and publishing, image uploads, and full schema introspection. Rate-limited to 500 query points per 60-second window.

offers.description: Available as part of Meetup Pro subscription

softwareRequirements: OAuth 2.0 Bearer token required; Meetup Pro subscription required for full access

potentialAction.name: Search Events
potentialAction.description: Search for events across the Meetup platform using eventsSearch query

potentialAction.name: Search Groups
potentialAction.description: Search for groups using groupsSearch query

potentialAction.name: Create Event
potentialAction.description: Create and publish a new Meetup event via GraphQL mutation
